results.rendered_html:
nir-√yā P. -yāti, to go out, come forth, go from (abl.) to or into (acc.), set out for (dat., [e.g. yuddhāya,  MBh. ; dig-jayāya,  Rājat. ] or artham [e.g. bhikṣārTam,  Pañc. ]),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
(with mṛgayām) to go hunting,  MBh. ;
to depart from life, die,  Car. ;
to pass away (as time),  Kāv. ;
to weed (a field),  MBh.  :
Caus. -yāpayati, to cause to go out &c.,  MBh. ;  R. ;
to drive away, expel from (abl.),  BhP.
